mapper.sql: dispatch_request_id, assignment_id, task_id, incident_id, agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id, site_id, status, review_mode, eligibility_status, dispatch_method, gateway_dispatch_path, dispatch_token, reason, command_json, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, dispatched_at, failed_at, attempt_count, last_error, last_callback_id, completed_at, timed_out_at, retry_waiting_at, next_retry_at, dead_letter_at, claimed_by, claim_started_at, claim_until
mapper.insert: insert into dispatch_requests () values ( #{request.dispatchRequestId}, #{request.assignmentId}, #{request.taskId}, #{request.incidentId}, #{request.agentId}, #{request.ownerGatewayNodeId}, #{request.agentSessionId}, #{request.siteId}, #{request.status}, #{request.reviewMode}, #{request.eligibilityStatus}, #{request.dispatchMethod}, #{request.gatewayDispatchPath}, #{request.dispatchToken}, #{request.reason}, coalesce(cast(#{request.commandJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), #{request.createdAt}, #{request.updatedAt}, #{request.approvedAt}, #{request.dispatchedAt}, #{request.failedAt}, #{request.attemptCount}, #{request.lastError}, #{request.lastCallbackId}, #{request.completedAt}, #{request.timedOutAt}, #{request.retryWaitingAt}, #{request.nextRetryAt}, #{request.deadLetterAt}, #{request.claimedBy}, #{request.claimStartedAt}, #{request.claimUntil} ) on conflict (dispatch_request_id) do update set agent_id = excluded.agent_id, owner_gateway_node_id = excluded.owner_gateway_node_id, agent_session_id = excluded.agent_session_id, site_id = excluded.site_id, status = excluded.status, review_mode = excluded.review_mode, eligibility_status = excluded.eligibility_status, dispatch_method = excluded.dispatch_method, gateway_dispatch_path = excluded.gateway_dispatch_path, dispatch_token = excluded.dispatch_token, reason = excluded.reason, command_json = excluded.command_json, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, dispatched_at = excluded.dispatched_at, failed_at = excluded.failed_at, attempt_count = excluded.attempt_count, last_error = excluded.last_error, last_callback_id = excluded.last_callback_id, completed_at = excluded.completed_at, timed_out_at = excluded.timed_out_at, retry_waiting_at = excluded.retry_waiting_at, next_retry_at = excluded.next_retry_at, dead_letter_at = excluded.dead_letter_at, claimed_by = excluded.claimed_by, claim_started_at = excluded.claim_started_at, claim_until = excluded.claim_until
mapper.select: select from dispatch_requests where assignment_id = #{assignmentId} and status in ('PENDING_REVIEW','APPROVED','RETRY_WAITING','DISPATCHING','DISPATCHED','ACKED','RUNNING') order by created_at desc limit 1

with candidate as ( select dispatch_request_id from dispatch_requests where dispatch_request_id = #{dispatchRequestId} and ( status = 'APPROVED' or (status = 'RETRY_WAITING' and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{now})) or (status = 'DISPATCHING' and (claim_until is null or claim_until <= #{now})) ) for update skip locked ) update dispatch_requests request set status = 'DISPATCHING', claimed_by = #{workerId}, claim_started_at = #{now}, claim_until = #{claimUntil}, attempt_count = request.attempt_count + 1, command_json = jsonb_set(coalesce(request.command_json, '{}'::jsonb), '{attemptNo}', to_jsonb(request.attempt_count + 1), true), retry_waiting_at = null, next_retry_at = null, updated_at = #{now} from candidate where request.dispatch_request_id = candidate.dispatch_request_id returning request.*

with candidates as ( select dispatch_request_id from dispatch_requests where status = 'APPROVED' or (status = 'RETRY_WAITING' and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{now})) or (status = 'DISPATCHING' and (claim_until is null or claim_until <= #{now})) order by updated_at asc nulls first, created_at asc for update skip locked limit #{limit} ) update dispatch_requests request set status = 'DISPATCHING', claimed_by = #{workerId}, claim_started_at = #{now}, claim_until = #{claimUntil}, attempt_count = request.attempt_count + 1, command_json = jsonb_set(coalesce(request.command_json, '{}'::jsonb), '{attemptNo}', to_jsonb(request.attempt_count + 1), true), retry_waiting_at = null, next_retry_at = null, updated_at = #{now} from candidates where request.dispatch_request_id = candidates.dispatch_request_id returning request.*
mapper.update: update dispatch_requests set agent_id = #{request.agentId}, owner_gateway_node_id = #{request.ownerGatewayNodeId}, agent_session_id = #{request.agentSessionId}, site_id = #{request.siteId}, status = #{request.status}, review_mode = #{request.reviewMode}, eligibility_status = #{request.eligibilityStatus}, dispatch_method = #{request.dispatchMethod}, gateway_dispatch_path = #{request.gatewayDispatchPath}, dispatch_token = #{request.dispatchToken}, reason = #{request.reason}, command_json = coalesce(cast(#{request.commandJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb), updated_at = #{request.updatedAt}, approved_at = #{request.approvedAt}, dispatched_at = #{request.dispatchedAt}, failed_at = #{request.failedAt}, attempt_count = #{request.attemptCount}, last_error = #{request.lastError}, last_callback_id = #{request.lastCallbackId}, completed_at = #{request.completedAt}, timed_out_at = #{request.timedOutAt}, retry_waiting_at = #{request.retryWaitingAt}, next_retry_at = #{request.nextRetryAt}, dead_letter_at = #{request.deadLetterAt}, claimed_by = null, claim_started_at = null, claim_until = null where dispatch_request_id = #{request.dispatchRequestId} and status = 'DISPATCHING' and claimed_by = #{workerId} and claim_until = #{expectedClaimUntil}
mapper.select: select from dispatch_requests order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
